question: The requirement for a person to be approved as an authorised flight examiner in an unmanned aircraft training organisation (UATO) is:

options.text: 18 years of age and holds a UA pilot licence
18 years of age and holds a private pilot licence
21 years of age and holds a commercial pilot licence
21 years of age and holds a UA pilot licence

classification_notes: AFE approval requirements align with pilot competency and licensing requirements.
